name: Luxury Silk Pad
description: Experience ultimate comfort with our luxury silk pads. Designed for breathability and softness, these pads offer superior protection while feeling like a second skin. Perfect for sensitive skin and long-lasting freshness throughout the day.

name: Bamboo Soft Tissue
description: Eco-friendly bamboo tissues that are gentle on your skin and the planet. Highly absorbent and naturally antibacterial, these tissues provide a premium feel without the environmental cost. A sustainable choice for your daily needs.

name: Velvet Lounge Chair
description: A statement piece for any modern living room. This velvet lounge chair combines ergonomic design with opulent materials. The deep emerald green fabric and gold-finished legs create a sophisticated look that doesn't compromise on comfort.

name: Hand-Woven Persian Rug
description: Authentic hand-woven Persian rug featuring intricate traditional patterns. Made from 100% organic wool and natural dyes, this rug adds warmth and timeless elegance to your home. Each piece is unique and built to last generations.
